actions.text:
Measured advancement requires continuous dedication.
Making headway means constantly hitting the ground running.
It is a challenge to keep going   when obstacles stand in our way but we must press forward.
A positive outcome is based 
on a determination to achieve, not on giving up.
Plans that are true to who we are will always lead us to success.

actions.text: We must press forward or we'll fall backwards.
